Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0810 "FOOTBALLEROFTHEYEARII-0810" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Footballer of the Year II.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The game should be dumped on the 4th hit at $0810 due to various decompression steps in the original loader (this includes proceeding past the loading/title screen and music).
